description: Microsoft Word 2010 is open. Assemble three grant component files from 'Documents\GrantParts' ('01_Specific_Aims.docx', '02_Research_Strategy.docx', and '03_Literature_Cited.docx') into a single master document named 'Final_Grant_Package.docx' in the Documents folder. The final document must contain the full text of all three files in the specified order (Aims, then Strategy, then Literature), with each section starting on a new page. Include a header on every page with the text 'PI: Dr. J. Doe - R01 Application' and page numbers in the bottom right footer.

metadata.header_text: PI: Dr. J. Doe - R01 Application
